name: comfortable-javascript
description: SDK for the Comfortable.io Delivery API for Javascript and Node.js

scripts.docker:install: docker compose run --rm sdk npm install
scripts.docker:test: docker compose run --rm sdk npm test
scripts.docker:build: docker compose run --rm sdk npm run build
scripts.docker:audit: docker compose run --rm sdk npm audit
scripts.docker:audit:prod: docker compose run --rm sdk npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.docker:audit:fix: docker compose run --rm sdk npm audit fix
scripts.docker:audit:fix:force: docker compose run --rm sdk npm audit fix --force

author: Christian Schwerdt <christian@cmft.io>
